head.title: Somnath Dwarka 4 Days 3 Nights: Rs.15,000 pp, Full Itinerary
head.meta_description: The 4 day Somnath Dwarka plan from Rs.15,000 pp: Bet Dwarka, Porbandar and both aartis. Where the third night goes, and why that decides your trip.
head.h1: Somnath Dwarka Package 4 Days 3 Nights: Itinerary, Price and Booking
head.ctr_rationale: Competitors title on price-off and best-price. This titles on the specific decision this duration forces, which is the only differentiated angle left and the thing the buyer is actually anxious about.

explicitly_not_owned.query: somnath dwarka tour package from ahmedabad

intent_lock.differentiation_proof: Owns the night-split decision (2N Dwarka + 1N Somnath versus the reverse), which exists only at 3 nights, plus the order-of-sacrifice rule when a highway day slips. The hub carries a summary clock only and links here for the split and the stay logic.
intent_lock.delta_test: PASS. The decision this page owns exists only at this night count and cannot be restated on the hub or on a sibling without becoming that page's subject.
information_gain: Publishes the night-split reasoning no competitor states, and the default with its justification.
Publishes the order of sacrifice when the drive runs late, decided before departure rather than argued in the car.

5_star.hotel: The Fern Sattva Resort at Dwarka, best available at Somnath

included: vehicle with driver for the full itinerary

aeo_geo.answer_snippet: A somnath dwarka package 4 days 3 nights costs Rs. 15,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 30,000 at 4 star and Rs. 37,500 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and your vehicle included.
quotable_first_party_claims: Rs. 15,000 per person for 3 nights at 3 star, vehicle included.
Dwarka to Somnath is 233 km on NH51, 5 to 6 hours.
Jay Somnath sound and light show runs 7:45 pm to 8:45 pm per the Shree Somnath Trust.
aeo_geo.zero_click_defense: The summary can take the price and the distance. It cannot take the decision table, the live permit timing or the reconfirmation of festival-day schedules for a specific date. Brand sits inside the answer snippet.

@graph.name: Somnath Dwarka Package 4 Days 3 Nights
@graph.description: The 4 day Somnath Dwarka plan from Rs.15,000 pp: Bet Dwarka, Porbandar and both aartis. Where the third night goes, and why that decides your trip.

@graph._build_note: Totals are the per person per night rate times 3 nights and are visible in the price table on the page. No aggregateRating until real reviews are on the page.

mainEntity.name: Is 4 days enough for Somnath and Dwarka?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Three nights is the first plan that holds both temples, Bet Dwarka and Porbandar without compressing a day. It is what most families book on a first visit.

mainEntity.name: What does a 4 days 3 nights Somnath Dwarka package cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rs. 15,000 per person at 3 star, Rs. 30,000 at 4 star and Rs. 37,500 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and vehicle included.

mainEntity.name: Can we do Bet Dwarka and reach Somnath the same day?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not with the 7:00 pm aarti at the far end. Bet Dwarka is a half day and Somnath is 233 km away. On a 4 day plan you do not have to choose, which is what the third night buys.
